zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Grosvenor於1433年出生在英國爾伊頓時，他的父親Ralph Grosvenor26歲，母親Joan Eaton17歲。他於大約1453年與Joan Fitton在英國爾伊頓 白 從萊頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年在英國英格蘭爾伊頓享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Grosvenor was born in 1433, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph Grosvenor, was 26 and his mother, Joan Eaton, was 17. He married Joan Fitton about 1453, in Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1502, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Grosvenor est né en 1433, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Grosvenor, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Eaton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Joan Fitton environ 1453, à Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1502, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Grosvenor(이)가 1433년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Grosvenor(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Eaton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1453년 영국 체실르 이턴 비 콘글레턴에서 Joan Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 이턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Fitton около 1453 г. в местности эатон би конглетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.
